actions.script: (() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('*')]; const target = els.find(el => el.children.length === 0 && el.textContent.trim() === '文生图'); if (target) { target.click(); return 'clicked 文生图'; } const link = [...document.querySelectorAll('a,span,div,li')].find(el => el.textContent.trim() === '文生图' && el.offsetParent !== null); if (link) { link.click(); return 'clicked 文生图 via link'; } return '文生图 not found'; })()

(() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('a,span,div,li,p,h1,h2,h3,h4')]; const target = els.find(el => el.textContent.trim() === '活动美陈' && el.offsetParent !== null); if (target) { target.click(); return 'clicked 活动美陈'; } return '活动美陈 not found'; })()

(() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('*')]; const target = els.find(el => el.textContent.trim() === '补充描述' && el.offsetParent !== null); if (!target) return '补充描述 not found'; let input = target.parentElement?.querySelector('textarea'); if (!input) { input = target.closest('.el-form-item')?.querySelector('textarea'); } if (!input) { const next = target.nextElementSibling; if (next && next.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') input = next; } if (input) { const nativeSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, 'value')?.set; if (nativeSetter) nativeSetter.call(input, '需要入口拱门、中心打卡装置、咖啡摊位和赞助商露出，整体年轻潮酷，适合商场中庭拍照传播。'); else input.value = '需要入口拱门、中心打卡装置、咖啡摊位和赞助商露出，整体年轻潮酷，适合商场中庭拍照传播。'; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return 'set 补充描述'; } return 'no textarea for 补充描述'; })()

(() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('*')]; const target = els.find(el => el.textContent.includes('开始生成') && el.offsetParent !== null && (el.tagName === 'BUTTON' || el.tagName === 'SPAN' || el.tagName === 'A' || el.tagName === 'DIV')); if (target) { const btn = target.closest('button') || target; btn.click(); return 'clicked 开始生成'; } return '开始生成 not found'; })()
